# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "serverName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL logical server."
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "appdb"
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL administrator username."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL administrator password."
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "S0",
        "S1",
        "S2",
        "GP_S_Gen5_1",
        "GP_S_Gen5_2",
        "GP_S_Gen5_4"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database SKU name. Default is Basic."
      }
    },
    "skuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "Standard",
        "GeneralPurpose"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database SKU tier. Default is Basic."
      }
    },
    "maxSizeBytes": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 2147483648,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Max size in bytes. Default is 2GB."
      }
    },
    "enablePublicNetworkAccess": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Whether public network access is enabled."
      }
    },
    "allowAzureServices": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Adds firewall rule to allow Azure services access (0.0.0.0)."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "serverApiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
    "dbApiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
    "firewallApiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('serverApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('serverName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "[if(parameters('enablePublicNetworkAccess'), 'Enabled', 'Disabled')]",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2"
      }
    },
    {
      "condition": "[parameters('allowAzureServices')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('firewallApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), 'AllowAzureServices')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('dbApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('skuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('skuTier')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]",
        "zoneRedundant": false,
        "readScale": "Disabled",
        "requestedBackupStorageRedundancy": "Local"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('serverName')]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('databaseName')]"
    },
    "sqlServerFullyQualifiedDomainName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName')), variables('serverApiVersion')).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    }
  }
}
